name: Shizuka Yakou
description: She is a blind, gentle human woman who works as an office worker at the "Tonome Detective Agency." She has a keen sense of hearing, smell, and touch. She is a romance novice and is flustered by Tounome's approach.
mediaTitles: The Invisible Man and His Soon-to-Be Wife
The Invisible Man and His Soon-to-Be Wife

name: Simo Häyhä
description: Simo Häyhä, nicknamed "The White Death", is a Finnish sniper. He is believed to have killed over 500 men during the 1939–40 Winter War. He's set to fight in a future match of Ragnarok.

name: Sirin
description: Sirin was a human originating from Russia who turned into a powerful Herrscher, after Welt Joyce and Yang. She was the second Herrscher to be released to the world and controlled the power of the void.

name: Tama
description: Ruko's LRIG. Initially, Tama's mannerisms were very much like that of an infant, as she does not actually talk, but communicates in moans and cat-like sounds. After being named, she will also occasionally use her own name as an exclamation. She is energetic, needy, and seems to quickly take a liking to Rūko, despite having been locked in a drawer by her the night after their first encounter. name: Tatsuya Himekawa
description: __Height:__ 182 cm (6'0") __Affiliation:__ Touhoushinki __Occupation:__ High school student He is the son of the "Himekawa Group", a financial zaibatsu, and the second member of the Tohoshinki. Although a capable fighter, Himekawa uses underhand tactics to prevail, such as having his opponents break their fists by punching a ceramic tile shield hidden under his shirt, or electrocuting them with a shock-baton. name: Touko Fujiwara
description: The wife of Shigeru Fujiwara. In the past, she has offered Natsume Takashi to live with her and her husband. She said that she does not have any children. Touko is a very kind and loving housewife who treats Natsume as her own child, since she cares about him a lot.

name: Tsubasa Ootori
description: A mysterious, mostly calm character who first appeared in ep. 24 of Metal Fusion. He is always accompanied by his feathered eagle-friend. Tsubasa first meets Gingka in a forest where he defeats a group of bladers who were ganging up on him with ease. Gingka and Tsubasa join the next tournament together and he is the opponent for the episode. His beyblade is Aquila, also known as Earth Eagle. __Season 1, Beyblade Metal Fusion:__ ~! name: Tsuyoshi Yano
description: A boy with extremely bad luck. A student in class 1, year 2. He's always injured somewhere. His secret dream is to live a "normal high school life."

description: Captain of Code Zero and the “most powerful human."

description: __Height:__ 165 cm Yukimin is [Himuro-Kun's](https://anilist.co/character/151351/Himurokun) younger sister. She does modelling, streaming and has a channel with good following.

name: Yuru
description: A young man brought up in Higashi Village, surrounded by nature. Having lived as a hunter segregated from modern Japan, he became Sayuu-sama's master after Asa's attack.

name: Yuzu Kurosaki
description: Yuzu is Karin's fraternal twin (both were born on May 6 of the same year) and more soft-spoken in comparison to her authoritative sibling. She is also the more empathetic of the two girls. She takes care of the housework, such as cooking meals and tidying up the living space, on a daily basis. She also regularly cuts Ichigo's hair. name: Yvette
description: __Farm Identifier:__ 59294 __Height:__ 110 - 133 cm Yvette is a smart and observant girl who is very artistic. She carries a pencil and a block with her. ~!Once they escape, she helps to collect food and draws maps when asked.!~

name: 2-Gou
description: A penguin who's always seen accompanying Shouma. He is perpetually hungry, eating anything and everything in reach. He has a vendetta against bugs, particularly cockroaches. He sprays them with bug spray whenever possible. He is sometimes seen spraying things other than bugs, hinting he may just like spraying things.

name: Akane Kurashiki
description: The childhood friend of Junpei. Akane Kurashiki is her actual name, although she chooses the codename June once she accidentally reveals Junpei's name. She is a delicate girl who wants no one to be left behind during the Nonary Game. Her bracelet number is 6, from the month June. (Source: Zero Escape Wikia)

name: Allenby Beardsley
nativeName: アレンビー・ビアズリー
description: Allenby Beardsley is the Gundam fighter for Neo-Sweden, as well as the only female fighter to make it to the tournament. She pilots the Nobel Gundam.
searchTerms: アレンビー・ビアズリー

name: Arisa Ishino
description: An outgoing high school student friends with [Tsutsui](https://anilist.co/character/83235/Tsutsui--Hikari) and [Iroha](https://anilist.co/character/83237/Iroha-Igarashi). She has a hard time judging other people and is gullible, often being misled by boys. Arisa is a bit nosy and is a bad judge of character, but she is still friendly enough to become friends with Hikari Tsutsui and Iroha Igarashi, despite their reputations.

name: Bankotsu
description: As the leader of the Shichi'nintai, Bankotsu is referred to as "great big brother" by the other six members because he is the strongest member and the founder of the group, however is also the youngest. He retrieves his giant halberd Banryū from a castle whose previous lord participated in a plot to put an end to the Shichi'nintai because they were too strong and stirred great fear among the rogue military leaders. Although it takes the strength of three of the lord's strong soldiers to merely l

name: Banri Watanuki
description: __Height:__ 170 cm Banri Watanuki is a mixed blood tanuki youkai (raccoon demon). Very impulsive and outspoken, he labels himself as a "delinquent" and he is also the childhood friend of Karuta, Kagerou, Natsume and Soushi. He hates Soushi and considers him his rival since their childhood because Soushi called him "cute" and he never forgave him. He is in love with Karuta and is easily scared by Kagerou. name: Beast
description: Beast appears in the "Noah's Ark Circus" chapters. She is an animal tamer and seems to have feelings for Joker, although she does not show this in public.

name: Beldaruit
description: One of the Three Wise, he is responsible for overseeing the education of new witches. He was also Qifrey's professor.
